keywords.name: center-point
keywords.description: Create a circle at the center location v1 . Specifies the circle radius f . Specifies a point v2 on the circle.

keywords.name: point-1
keywords.description: Create a circle through two points on the circumference. .. kwd:: quad-split f Add a square block inside the circle. The square helps improve the shape of the zones inside the circle.
